description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

v1.20.1 Fixes
• Fixed "pull to refresh" triggering by mistake when scrolling event details — custom pull-to-refresh no longer activates while a modal is open
• Fixed startup error when fetching personal calendar (iCal URL) — regression that had been broken since the layout change in v1.19.0
• Fixed calendars set to "off by default" (like English version) disappearing on reload after toggling — settings are now stored on the device (localStorage) so network delays don't affect them

v1.20.0 Event Calendar
• Added English-language calendars for "Myはんのう" and "Hanno City Government" — turn on subscriptions in the settings panel to display events in English (off by default)
• Redesigned subscription settings model — "calendars on by default record only those turned off; calendars off by default record only those turned on." Third-party and language-specific calendars now appear in their correct default states

v1.19.2 Bus
• Pick a different day on the top screen, then open "Take/return bus" to see that day's timetable directly
• Bus page now has previous/next day buttons + clicking the date opens a calendar
• Bus timetable "arrives in X minutes" now uses floor division (less than 1 minute shows as "less than 1 minute")
• Intermediate stop times are now monospace and easier to read
• Bus timetables for dates other than today show no countdown; only displays intermediate stop information

v1.19.2 Trash Collection
• Trash section for today afternoon (noon onward) and past dates now closed by default (folded to avoid clutter for non-morning use)
• Trash section for tomorrow onward stays open (closes when you toggle it; remembers your choice for that day)

v1.19.2 Minor Improvements
• Changed detail-link icon that was colliding with mayor's blog icon to an external-link arrow

v1.19.1 Major Changes
• Top page now supports any date — no longer just next/previous day; you can switch the entire screen to any date
• ◀️ ▶️ buttons on either side of the large date for previous/next day
• Tap the large date → calendar to jump to any date
• Tap the inverted badge ("Tomorrow," "N days from now", etc.) → always returns to today
• Past weather is also available (back decades)
• Non-current dates can be shared and bookmarked via URL (?date=YYYY-MM-DD)

v1.19.1 Morning Trash Collection
• Clock appears large above the pictogram only on days when today's trash is being collected. Check the time even without glasses after waking up.

v1.19.1 Calendar Readability
• Saturdays shown in blue across the entire row; Sundays and holidays shown in red across the entire row for easier reading
• Holiday names (e.g. Constitution Day / Greenery Day) displayed in red bold text on the calendar strip
